# Meow Mapping

> Cat Spotting Guides for reaching cat-filled destinations, mainly in Japan.

Site: https://meow.carrier.express

This site publishes travel guides focused on how to reach real-world cat spots, not just listing them. The content is organized by locale and category, with long-form destination pages backed by MDX content.

## Locales

- English: https://meow.carrier.express/
- Traditional Chinese: https://meow.carrier.express/tw

## Content Structure

- Home pages list all guides grouped by category.
- Category pages list guides for one topic.
- Destination pages are the main long-form resources.

## Categories

- Islands: remote cat islands that usually require ferries and longer transit.
- Temples: temples and shrines where cats live around the grounds.
- Neighborhoods: walkable areas, streets, and towns where cats live among residents.

## English Category Pages

- Islands: https://meow.carrier.express/islands
- Temples: https://meow.carrier.express/temples
- Neighborhoods: https://meow.carrier.express/neighborhoods

## Traditional Chinese Category Pages

- Islands: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/islands
- Temples: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/temples
- Neighborhoods: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/neighborhoods

## English Destination Guides

- Ainoshima, Fukuoka: https://meow.carrier.express/islands/fukuoka-ainoshima
- Sanagijima, Kagawa: https://meow.carrier.express/islands/kagawa-sanagijima
- Tashirojima, Miyagi: https://meow.carrier.express/islands/miyagi-tashirojima
- Gotanjouji, Fukui: https://meow.carrier.express/temples/fukui-gotanjouji
- Fushimi Inari Taisha, Kyoto: https://meow.carrier.express/temples/kyoto-fushimiinaritaisha
- Gokokuji, Tokyo: https://meow.carrier.express/temples/tokyo-gokokuji
- Enoshima, Kamakura: https://meow.carrier.express/neighborhoods/kamakura-enoshima
- Beppu, Oita: https://meow.carrier.express/neighborhoods/oita-beppu
- Neko no Hosomichi, Onomichi: https://meow.carrier.express/neighborhoods/onomichi-nekonohosomichi

## Traditional Chinese Destination Guides

- 香川・佐柳島: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/islands/kagawa-sanagijima
- 宮城・田代島: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/islands/miyagi-tashirojima
- 福井・御誕生寺: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/temples/fukui-gotanjouji
- 東京・護國寺: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/temples/tokyo-gokokuji
- 大分・別府的巷弄深處: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/neighborhoods/oita-beppu
- 尾道・猫の細道: https://meow.carrier.express/tw/neighborhoods/onomichi-nekonohosomichi

## Notes for LLMs

- English has broader coverage than the Traditional Chinese section at the moment.
- Destination pages usually include route context, transport modes, trip duration, difficulty, and visit notes.
- Category and locale are encoded directly in the URL path.
